item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i guess
i have no idea where this picture is from
mmm hmm
we used to be a proper country
love a good life hack
i don't have access to monkeys or mummies
just see if your hair feels nicer?
obviously
no way this actually happened
ALL the dragons??
yes
i get this but if its a few of my favorite bands i will just be happy to meet another fan
why is there a cowboy spider
go on.. have a little nibble. you earned it
wait what
see ya, snoopy
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Stolen Tuesday MEMES Dump #211 (For your viewing pleasure)
item.description:
2. When the quite friend speaks up
3
4. How I expect 2025 to be for the world
5. Cat playing the role of both the human and the cat
6. That's a neat trick
7. How it looks when someone "helps" you during college team assignments
8. You can either learn skills or to be skilled at video editing!
9. Dog is very angry!
10. A good boiii but not the smartest boiii
11
12
13
14. I'm sorry sir but I'm going to need to see some id, ego and super-ego
15. I like narrative games where you can mess around with The Narrator! This is the latest thing I added to the game. Kind of reminds of the Broom Closet from The Stanley Parable. If you like this style of games, please consider wishlisting my wacky comedic narrative game here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: And now for something completely different.
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: A favor to ask If you are in DC or Northern Virginia
item.description:
Good evening folks, It's been a long while since DC received significant snow, and I have always wanted a picture of my pop's tombstone after a snowstorm. If fact, i dont think it has snowed there since he was buried there in 2022. Once things clear up a bit, I was hoping someone could stop by his grave and take a picture for me. My pop went out to Arlington often during and after snowstorm, took many pictures. He knew that one day, the snow there would be covering him as well.
Hes a stones throw away from the tomb of the unknown soldier, and right next to the road. Theres actually 2 thomas blues in section 37. Hes the one by the roadside on Wilson. Grave 5208
For those that dont know what the markings of his headstone mean: Ss and olc: silver star and oak leaf cluster, meaning he awarded 2 Lm and olc: legion of merit and oak leaf cluster. Again, indicative of being awarded 2 Bsm w/v and 4 olc: bronze star medal with the valor device, and 4 oak leaf clusters, meaning he was awarded 5 bronze stars
I would be forever grateful if someone could help me out
item.dc:creator: Fenwaywookie

Not on my birth control :(

AGE GAPS AND STALKING SHOULD NOT BE ROMANTICIZED

That's dark
my favourite bug
This is a Cyberpunk horror story.
Dunno why he needs ChatGPT but I guess it's topical
I love when fantasy turns into sci-fi
https://www.decisionproblem.com/paperclips/index2.html a fun browser game on the topic
Alternate universes are sci-fi right? Close enough for a trophy post.
He is someone able to play chicken with batman
Grenade!
Plus all the husbands they could want

item.title: Assumption University lol
item.description: "There was no indication that the man was trying to meet underage girls and the woman who invited him to the campus, Kelsy Brainard, 18, said on her Tinder profile that she was 18 years old, the police said." Assumption University with the apt name I guess.
